meta.description: NakshIQ Canva visual library — maps images to content dimensions for anti-repetition rotation

mood_shots.description: Dreamy destination mood posters — single stunning image, minimal text

subjects.prompt: Varanasi ghats at dawn, golden sunrise reflecting off the Ganges, ancient temples silhouetted, smoke from morning rituals, rowing boat on still water. Spiritual, timeless, cinematic.
Empty Goa beach at sunset, golden sand with gentle waves, palm tree silhouettes, pink-orange sky, a single beach shack with warm lights. Tropical paradise, relaxed vibes.
Pangong Lake at twilight, impossible blue water reflecting snow-capped mountains, clear starry sky beginning to appear, dramatic Ladakh landscape. Otherworldly, vast, serene.
Darjeeling tea gardens at sunrise with Kanchenjunga visible in background, layers of green tea bushes with golden morning light, mist in valleys below. Classic, serene.
Kerala backwaters at golden hour, traditional houseboat gliding through calm palm-lined canals, mirror reflection in water, warm tropical light. Peaceful, idyllic.
Hampi boulder landscape at sunset, massive ancient granite boulders with Virupaksha temple in distance, golden-orange light, dramatic scale. Ancient, majestic.
Lake Pichola at blue hour, City Palace illuminated reflecting in still water, boats moored, Aravalli hills silhouetted. Romantic, regal, timeless.
Rishikesh at dawn, Ganges flowing turquoise through forested valley, Lakshman Jhula bridge in distance, morning fog, spiritual energy. Adventurous yet peaceful.
Coorg coffee plantation at misty morning, rows of coffee plants under shade trees, worker with basket walking through, golden light filtering through canopy. Rich, earthy.
White Rann of Kutch at full moon night, endless white salt desert stretching to horizon, moonlight creating ethereal glow, starry sky. Surreal, otherworldly, vast.
Spiti Valley monastery perched on cliff edge, barren dramatic mountain landscape, deep blue sky, prayer flags fluttering, ancient Buddhist architecture against stark terrain. Remote, spiritual.
Radhanagar Beach Andaman at sunset, pristine white sand meeting turquoise crystal water, tropical forest behind, dramatic clouds lit orange-pink. Paradise found.
Living root bridge in Meghalaya rainforest, ancient tree roots woven into natural bridge over crystal stream, lush green canopy, dappled light. Magical, organic, unique.
Blue city Jodhpur from Mehrangarh Fort, endless blue-painted houses stretching below, warm golden fort walls in foreground, clear sky. Iconic, colorful, dramatic.
Mysore Palace illuminated at night, 100000 lightbulbs creating golden glow, ornate Indo-Saracenic architecture, dramatic night sky. Royal, magnificent, festive.

activities.description: Activity mood posters — single dramatic action shot

subjects.prompt: Tent pitched on mountain ridge at night, milky way visible, campfire glow, Himalayan silhouette. Adventurous, peaceful, epic.
White water rafting on Ganges at Rishikesh, dramatic rapids, excited faces, lush green valley walls. Adrenaline, adventure, teamwork.
Paraglider soaring over Bir Billing valley, bird's eye view of patchwork fields and Himalayas, golden hour. Freedom, flight, scale.
Scuba diver exploring coral reef in Andaman Islands, crystal clear turquoise water, tropical fish, sunlight beams. Underwater paradise.
Cyclist on mountain road in Ladakh, dramatic barren landscape, snow peaks, clear blue sky, long empty highway. Endurance, solitude, epic.
Kayaker on calm backwaters in Kerala, palm trees reflecting, golden morning light, single paddle stroke creating ripples. Serene adventure.
Rock climber on granite face at Hampi, ancient boulder landscape below, warm sunset light on rock. Strength meets history.
Skier carving through fresh powder in Gulmarg, snow-covered pines, bright blue sky, Kashmir Himalayas in background. Winter thrill.
Open jeep safari in Ranthambore, tiger walking across trail, dry deciduous forest, ancient fort visible on hill above. Wild India.
Surfer riding wave at Kovalam beach, golden sunset behind, palm-lined shore, warm tropical water. India's surf culture emerging.

seasons.description: Seasonal mood posters — best time to travel visuals

subjects.prompt: Torrential rain over Western Ghats, waterfalls cascading down misty green cliffs, winding road disappearing into clouds. Deep emeralds, silver rain, dramatic.
Snow-covered Himalayan village at dawn, smoke rising from chimneys, frozen stream, warm golden light on snow. Cozy, remote, magical.
Valley of Flowers Uttarakhand in full bloom, carpets of wildflowers in every color against snow peaks, blue sky, butterflies. Rebirth, color explosion.
Hill station escape — Shimla/Manali colonial building surrounded by deodars, cool blue mountains in background, clear sky, families walking. Refreshing retreat.
Kashmir autumn, Chinar trees in blazing red-orange-gold, Dal Lake reflection, Mughal garden, warm low sunlight. India's most beautiful season.
Varanasi during Diwali, thousands of oil lamps (diyas) floating on Ganges, golden light reflections, Dev Deepawali spectacle. Magical, spiritual, breathtaking.

food.description: Food city/region posters — mouthwatering food photography

subjects.title: LUCKNOW FOOD TRAIL
subjects.prompt: Lucknowi kebabs and biryani spread, tunday kebab, nihari, ornate Nawabi plate setting, warm moody lighting. Rich, royal, aromatic.

subjects.title: AMRITSAR FOOD TRAIL
subjects.prompt: Amritsari kulcha, butter chicken, lassi, street food spread at Katra Ahluwalia, warm golden light. Generous, buttery, iconic.

subjects.title: KOLKATA FOOD TRAIL
subjects.prompt: Bengali food spread: mishti doi, fish curry, puchka, Kathi roll, rasgulla, on traditional plates. Sweet, savory, cultural.

subjects.title: CHENNAI FOOD TRAIL
subjects.prompt: South Indian breakfast: crispy dosa on banana leaf, sambar, coconut chutney, filter coffee, idli. Steaming, fresh, traditional.

subjects.title: DELHI STREET FOOD
subjects.prompt: Chandni Chowk street food panorama: paranthas, chole bhature, jalebi, chaat, bustling narrow lane with food stalls. Chaotic, delicious, iconic.

subjects.title: RAJASTHANI THALI
subjects.prompt: Full Rajasthani thali from above: dal baati churma, gatte ki sabzi, ker sangri, bajra roti, 15 small bowls on steel plate. Colorful, generous, royal.

subjects.title: GOA FOOD TRAIL
subjects.prompt: Goan seafood spread: fish curry rice, prawn balchao, bebinca, feni, on rustic wooden table near beach. Coastal, spicy, laid-back.

subjects.title: MUMBAI STREET FOOD
subjects.prompt: Mumbai street food: vada pav, pav bhaji, bhel puri, cutting chai, at beach-side stall at sunset. Fast, flavorful, iconic.

festivals.description: Festival visual posters — cultural celebration imagery

subjects.prompt: Holi celebration, explosion of colorful powder in air, joyful faces, Mathura/Vrindavan temple background. Vibrant, ecstatic, cultural.
Diwali night, thousands of diyas, rangoli, fireworks over temple silhouette, warm golden-orange glow. Magical, festive, spiritual.
Pushkar Camel Fair at sunset, thousands of camels, colorful Rajasthani turbans, desert horizon, golden light. Cultural spectacle.
Kolkata Durga Puja pandal at night, ornate goddess idol, dramatic lighting, crowds, artistic installation. Grand, devotional, artistic.
Onam celebration in Kerala, boat race on backwaters, flower carpet (pookalam), sadya feast on banana leaf. Traditional, colorful, joyful.
Ganesh Chaturthi visarjan procession in Mumbai, massive decorated idol, dancing crowds, colored powder, monsoon sky. Energy, devotion, spectacle.
